---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new language feature, runtime capability, or tooling addition
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this feature solve? What is currently impossible or painful?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature. If it is a language addition, show example YUSPEC syntax:

```yuspec
// Proposed new syntax
```

## Alternatives Considered
Other approaches you considered and why they were not chosen.

## Domain / Use Case
Which YUSPEC domain(s) benefit most?  
[ ] game  [ ] network  [ ] workflow  [ ] iot  [ ] simulation  [ ] testing  [ ] distributed

## Breaking Change?
[ ] Yes — this changes existing syntax/semantics  
[ ] No — purely additive

## Additional Context
Links, references, prior art, or any other relevant information.
